decisions.decision: Change frontend ContributionResponse.category from string to nested ContributionCategoryResponse object, render .name in table
decisions.rationale: Backend ContributionResponse.java returns nested ContributionCategoryResponse with id/name/description/active/isMandatory. Frontend typed it as string, causing [object Object] rendering.

decisions.decision: Send contributionMonth as YYYY-MM-01 (first of month) instead of YYYY-MM
decisions.rationale: Backend RecordContributionRequest.contributionMonth is LocalDate (YYYY-MM-DD). DB column is type date. Sending YYYY-MM causes Jackson parse failure. First-of-month is semantically correct for monthly tracking.

decisions.decision: Fix month filter comparison to use slice(0,7) on both sides
decisions.rationale: Backend returns contributionMonth as 2026-02-01 (full date). Frontend month picker produces 2026-02. Direct === comparison never matches. Slicing both to 7 chars gives correct month matching.
Zero imports from src/. Uses 'PAID' status which doesn't exist in ContributionStatus enum (should be CONFIRMED). Superseded by inline summary in Contributions.tsx:107-113.

decisions.decision: Fix BulkContributionRequest type to match backend with shared defaults + per-item overrides
decisions.rationale: Frontend type has flat contributions: RecordContributionRequest[]. Backend has shared defaults (paymentMode, contributionMonth, contributionDate, categoryId, batchReference) plus contributions: BulkContributionItemRequest[] where each item has memberId, amount, and optional overrides.

decisions.decision: Add ContributionCategoryRequest type for category CRUD
decisions.rationale: Backend ContributionCategoryRequest has name (required), description, active, isMandatory. No frontend type exists yet.

decisions.decision: Wire ContributionCategories.tsx to live /api/v1/contribution-categories CRUD API
decisions.rationale: Page uses hardcoded mock data with columns (amount, cadence) that don't exist in backend schema. Rewrite to fetch live categories, enable Add/Edit/Delete with modals.

decisions.decision: Wire ContributionOperations.tsx to live confirm/reverse/bulk endpoints
decisions.rationale: Page uses hardcoded mock data with disabled buttons. Service functions already exist (confirmContribution, reverseContribution, recordBulkContributions). Wire page to fetch live data and enable actions.

constraints: Backend DTOs are source of truth — frontend types must match exactly
No backend changes — all fixes are frontend-only
RecordContributionModal already tested in review pass 3 — preserve referenceNumber field
Must pass tsc --noEmit, vite build, npm test after changes
Backend ContributionCategory has no amount or cadence fields — remove those columns from categories page
Category CRUD requires ADMIN role — service functions use /api/v1/contribution-categories
Bulk contribution uses shared defaults (paymentMode, month, date, category) + per-item (memberId, amount)
